debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ range (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A) = 𝒫 A

proof:
by
  ext B
  constructor
  · intro ⟨X, hBX⟩
    intro y hyB
    rw [← hBX] at hyB
    obtain ⟨x, _, hxy⟩ := hyB
    rw [← hxy]
    exact x.property
  · intro hBA
    use {x : A | x.val ∈ B}
    ext y
    constructor
    · intro ⟨x, hxB, hxy⟩
      rw [← hxy]
      exact hxB
    · intro hyB
      exact ⟨⟨y, hBA hyB⟩, hyB, rfl⟩
